## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] **Content validates** — `npm run build` succeeds locally (content collections pass schema validation).
- [ ] **Images compressed** — every new image is under 500 KB and sized close to how it renders.
- [ ] **No PII committed** — no personal emails, phone numbers, home addresses, or private contact details in content, code, or commit history.
- [ ] **Links work** — new or changed links point to the right place (forms, socials, internal pages).
- [ ] **Structural files** — if this touches `astro.config.mjs`, `src/content/config.ts`, `.github/`, or `public/admin/config.yml`, a maintainer review is requested (CODEOWNERS).
